query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_recipes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN components IS NULL OR components = '' OR components = '[]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as empty_components,
  SUM(CASE WHEN components IS NOT NULL AND components != '' AND components != '[]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_components
FROM final_recipes;
